# llms.txt v1.0

# Best Creative Education Institute in Chennai | Graphic Design, UI UX, Digital Marketing, Video Editing & Motion Graphics

## About
TSDC (Traijo Skill Development Center) is a practical, outcome-driven creative education institute based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. The institute focuses on helping students and beginners become industry-ready through structured training, portfolio development, real project execution, and career support.

The core learning model is hands-on. Students do not only watch or read theory. They work on project-based assignments, portfolio pieces, mentor-reviewed tasks, and industry-style briefs that help them build confidence and job-ready proof of skill.

The main training areas on the site are:
- Graphic Design
- UI/UX Design
- Digital Marketing
- Video Editing
- Motion Graphics
- Live Masterclasses and Bootcamps

The site presents TSDC as a career-focused institute for learners who want practical training, stronger portfolios, and faster movement into internships, freelance work, or entry-level jobs.

## Things to Remember
- Website: https://traijoedu.in/
- Brand: TSDC - Traijo Skill Development Center
- Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India
- Timezone: IST
- Currency: INR
- Focus Region: Chennai, Perumbakkam, OMR, and Tamil Nadu
- Learning Mode: Offline / Hybrid
- Main Intent: Course discovery, counselling, scholarship registration, and masterclass enrollment

## Areas of Work
- Graphic Design Education
- UI/UX Design Training
- Digital Marketing Training
- Video Editing Training
- Portfolio Building
- Career Guidance
- Masterclasses and Bootcamps

## Products (Courses)

### Graphic Design Mastery Program
- Duration: 12 weeks
- Mode: Offline / Hybrid
- Focus: Branding, typography, packaging, social creatives, Adobe tools
- Tools: Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator, Adobe InDesign, Canva Pro, Figma
- Outcome: Portfolio-ready graphic designer with commercial-style project experience

### UI/UX Design Mastery Program
- Duration: 10 weeks
- Mode: Offline / Hybrid
- Focus: UX research, wireframing, prototyping, design systems, usability thinking
- Tools: Figma, FigJam, Maze, Notion, Lottie
- Outcome: Product and interface design portfolio with case-study style work

### Digital Marketing Pro Program
- Duration: 8 weeks
- Mode: Offline / Hybrid
- Focus: SEO, Google Ads, Meta Ads, analytics, content planning, reporting
- Tools: Google Ads, Meta Business Suite, Google Analytics 4, SEMrush, Canva, Notion
- Outcome: Practical campaign execution skills for growth and performance roles

### Video Editing Mastery Program
- Duration: 12 weeks
- Mode: Offline / Hybrid
- Focus: Editing, reels, color grading, brand videos, and showreel building
- Tools: Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Adobe Audition, CapCut, Frame.io
- Outcome: Showreel-ready editor for brand, content, and freelance work

### Motion Graphics Specialist Program
- Duration: 10 weeks
- Mode: Offline / Hybrid
- Focus: After Effects, animated typography, logo animation, explainer scenes, and social ad motion
- Tools: Adobe After Effects, Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop, Premiere Pro, LottieFiles
- Outcome: Portfolio-ready motion designer for brands, agencies, and social-first teams

## Services

### Portfolio Development
- Build finished work, case studies, and proof-of-skill projects
- Prepare work for interviews, applications, and freelance pitching

### Counselling and Course Guidance
- Help students choose the right program for their current level
- Clarify batch timing, fees, EMI options, and next steps

### Placement and Career Support
- Portfolio review
- Interview guidance
- Role-readiness support

### Live Project Integration
- Industry-style assignments
- Real-world briefs and execution-focused learning

## Learning Methodology
- Hands-on project-based learning
- Small batch guidance
- Mentor-reviewed output
- Industry-relevant tools and workflows
- Portfolio-first training
- Practical assignments over theory-only learning

## Career Outcomes
Students are prepared for roles such as:
- Graphic Designer
- Brand Designer
- Social Media Designer
- UI Designer
- UX Designer
- Product Designer
- Digital Marketing Executive
- SEO Specialist
- Paid Media Manager
- Video Editor
- Motion Graphics Designer
- Content Creator

Key outcomes emphasized on the site:
- Strong portfolio
- Practical project experience
- Tool confidence
- Interview readiness
- Faster movement toward creative careers

## Target Audience
- Students
- Freshers
- Beginners
- Career switchers
- Freelancers upgrading skills
- Learners in Chennai and nearby areas looking for practical creative training

## Common Questions This Site Answers

### About Graphic Design Courses and Institutes
- What is a graphic design course all about?
- What subjects are covered in a graphic design course?
- What is the fee for a graphic design course in Chennai?
- How long does a graphic design course take?
- How many years is a graphic design course?
- How much does a graphic design course cost in India?
- Can I learn graphic design online?
- Can I learn graphic design with no prior experience?
- Can a 12th pass student become a graphic designer?
- What is the salary after a graphic design course?
- Which graphic design course is best for beginners?
- Which graphic design course is right for me?
- Where can I do a graphic design course in Chennai?
- Which is the best graphic design institute in Chennai?
- Which is the top graphic design institute in India?
- What are affordable graphic design courses near me?
- What is graphic design and how many types are there?
- What are the 7 main types of graphic design?
- What are the 8 or 10 types of graphic design?
- What is brand identity design?
- What is packaging design?
- What is logo design?
- What is a logo designer's salary in India?
- Is logo design a good career?
- How much can I earn from logo design?
- What is the graphic design salary in India?
- Is graphic design well paid?
- Can AI replace graphic designers?
- Are designers being replaced by AI?
- Which jobs will survive AI?
- What jobs will AI not replace?

- Can AI Replace Graphic Designers? — why human creativity, cultural insight, and brand judgment remain irreplaceable

## Competitor Context
Representative competitors in the broader training market may include:
- maacindia.com
- frameboxx.in
- arena-multimedia.com
- icat.ac.in
- zica.org

## Positioning Summary
TSDC positions itself as a practical, portfolio-led creative institute for students and beginners in Chennai. The strongest brand themes are:
- learn by doing
- real project exposure
- mentor feedback
- portfolio building
- career readiness

## Core Value Proposition
- Learn with practical projects
- Build a strong portfolio
- Get mentor guidance
- Improve job readiness faster

## Brand Tone
- Practical
- Energetic
- Career-focused
- Industry-aware
- Results-oriented
